brands.name: Microsoft
brands.colorUsage: Communication Blue (#0078D4) for ALL interactive elements. Four-color logo ONLY in logo contexts, never as UI colors. Gray-20 (#F3F2F1) for subtle backgrounds. Product-specific colors: Teams purple, Xbox green, Azure blue. Never use logo colors decoratively.
brands.typographyScale: Hero: 68px/1.0 • Display: 42px/1.1 • H1: 28px/1.14 • H2: 24px/1.17 • H3: 20px/1.2 • Body: 14px/1.43 • Caption: 12px/1.33. Segoe UI is the system font on Windows.
brands.spacing: Base: 8px (Fluent uses 4px increments). Card padding: 16-24px. Section margins: 48px. Grid gap: 16-24px. Page margins: 48px desktop, 16px mobile. Max-width: 1600px.
brands.components:
• Cards: Rounded (4-8px), subtle shadow, white bg
• Buttons: Rounded (4px), 32px height, Communication Blue primary
• Command Bar: Top toolbar with icon buttons
• Pivot/Tabs: Underline style, selected has blue underline
• Persona: Avatar + name + metadata, 32/48/72px sizes
• Dialog: Centered modal, 320-640px width
brands.motion: Fluent Motion principles. Duration: 150-300ms. Ease: cubic-bezier(0.1, 0.9, 0.2, 1) for decelerate, cubic-bezier(0.9, 0.1, 1, 0.2) for accelerate. Reveal effects on hover. Depth transitions for panels.
brands.layout: Fluent app layout: Left nav (48-280px), top command bar, content area. Hub pages with hero. Master-detail patterns. Responsive grid: 12-column. Max-width containers centered.
brands.responsive:
• Desktop (>1024px): Full nav, 1600px max-width
• Tablet (640-1024px): Collapsible nav, reduced margins
• Mobile (<640px): Bottom nav or hamburger, full-width content, 16px margins
brands.iconStyle: Fluent UI Icons — 16/20/24/28/32px. Filled and outline variants. 1-1.5px stroke for outline. Consistent visual weight. Monochrome in UI.
brands.interactiveStates:
• Hover: Background lighten/darken, elevation increase
• Focus: 2px black border (high contrast mode compliant)
• Pressed: Scale 0.98, darker bg
• Disabled: 40% opacity
• Selected: Blue indicator (underline or fill)
brands.mediaPatterns:
• Hero images: Full-width, 16:9 or 21:9 ultrawide
• Product shots: On gradient or solid color background
• Icons grid: 4-8 columns, consistent sizing
• Avatar: Circle (Persona component), 32/48/72/100px
• Video: 16:9, rounded corners (8px), controls on hover
brands.copyVoice: Inclusive, empowering, clear. 'Empower every person and every organization.' Second-person, active voice. Accessibility-conscious language. Professional but warm.

brands.name: Tailwind CSS
brands.colorUsage: Cyan for primary brand and links. Documentation is DARK MODE default (slate-900 bg). Code blocks are signature — dark with syntax highlighting. Gradient accents (cyan→sky→violet→pink) for hero sections only. Light mode exists but dark is preferred.
brands.typographyScale: Hero: 64px/1.1/−0.02em • H1: 48px/1.15 • H2: 36px/1.2 • H3: 24px/1.25 • Body: 16px/1.75 • Small: 14px/1.5 • Code: 14px/1.7 mono. Generous line-heights for readability.
brands.spacing: Base: 4px (matches Tailwind spacing scale). Section: 96px (py-24). Cards: 24px padding (p-6). Max-width: 80ch for prose, 1280px for page. Very precise spacing aligned to 4px grid.
brands.components:
• Code blocks: Dark (slate-800), syntax highlighted, language badge, copy button
• Prose: Max-width 65ch, generous leading (1.75)
• Cards: Rounded-xl (12px), slate-800 bg, subtle border
• Buttons: Rounded-lg (8px), cyan-500 fill, 36-40px height
• Tabs: Underline style with cyan indicator
• Search (Algolia): Rounded modal, ⌘K trigger
brands.elevation:
• Level 0: No shadow (dark mode default)
• Level 1: 0 1px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.3) — Cards on dark
• Level 2: 0 4px 12px rgba(0,0,0,0.4) — Dropdowns
• Ring focus: ring-2 ring-cyan-500 ring-offset-2 ring-offset-slate-900
brands.motion: Subtle, developer-focused. Duration: 150-200ms. Transitions: colors, opacity, transform. No playful animations. Code examples: Type effect or fade-in. Smooth scrolling between sections.
brands.layout: Documentation layout: Left sidebar (256px), content (prose-lg centered), right TOC (200px). Marketing: Full-width hero, centered content sections. Grid: Flexible, content-width containers.
brands.responsive:
• Desktop (>1280px): Full 3-column docs layout
• Laptop (1024-1280px): Right TOC hidden
• Tablet (768-1024px): Sidebar as overlay sheet
• Mobile (<768px): Single column, hamburger nav, bottom-sticky search
brands.iconStyle: Heroicons (made by Tailwind team) — 20/24px. Outline (1.5px stroke) or solid. Consistent sizing. Used sparingly in docs.
brands.interactiveStates:
• Hover: bg-slate-700 from bg-slate-800
• Focus: ring-2 ring-cyan-500 (visible focus rings)
• Active: Scale 0.98
• Code hover: Copy button appears
• Link: text-cyan-400 hover:text-cyan-300
brands.mediaPatterns:
• Code snippets: Full-width, rounded-xl, dark bg, line numbers optional
• Comparison: Before/after side-by-side code
• Component examples: Live preview + code below
• Diagrams: Simple, brand colors, minimal
• Screenshots: Rounded-lg, subtle shadow
brands.copyVoice: Developer-focused, practical, confident. 'Rapidly build modern websites without ever leaving your HTML.' Documentation is exhaustive and clear. No marketing fluff. Examples > explanations.

brands.name: Supabase
brands.colorUsage: Green (#3ECF8E) for primary brand, success, and CTAs. DARK MODE is default — marketing and dashboard both. Light mode exists but dark is signature. Green glow effects (box-shadow with green) for emphasis. Terminal aesthetic.

typography.headings: Source Sans Pro Bold / Inter Bold
typography.body: Source Sans Pro Regular / Inter Regular

brands.typographyScale: Hero: 56px/1.1 • H1: 40px/1.15 • H2: 32px/1.2 • H3: 24px/1.25 • Body: 16px/1.6 • Small: 14px/1.5 • Code: 14px/1.6. Monospace is first-class.
brands.spacing: Base: 4px. Card padding: 20-24px. Section margins: 64-96px. Dashboard density: tighter. Marketing: generous. Max-width: 1280px.
brands.components:
• Code blocks: Dark (#2A2A2A), green-tinted syntax, copy button, language tabs
• Dashboard cards: Dark surface, green accents for active states
• SQL Editor: Monaco-style, dark theme, run button green
• Buttons: Rounded (6px), green primary, 36px height
• Tables: Dense data tables, sortable, green highlights
• Terminal: Green text on black, blinking cursor
brands.elevation:
• Level 0: No shadow (flat dark surfaces)
• Level 1: 0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.5) — Cards
• Level 2: 0 4px 16px rgba(0,0,0,0.6) — Dropdowns
• Green glow: 0 0 20px rgba(62,207,142,0.3) — Emphasis
brands.motion: Smooth, developer-focused. Duration: 150-250ms. Terminal typing effects for marketing. Code blocks: Syntax highlight fade-in. Dashboard: Instant transitions. Loading: Green spinner.
brands.layout: Dashboard: Left nav (240px), content area. SQL Editor: Full-height split pane. Marketing: Hero + feature sections. Docs: 3-column with sidebar + TOC.
brands.responsive:
• Desktop (>1200px): Full layout, 1280px max
• Laptop (900-1200px): Reduced sidebar
• Tablet (600-900px): Overlay sidebar
• Mobile (<600px): Bottom nav for dashboard, hamburger for marketing
brands.iconStyle: Feather icons style, 20px. 1.5px stroke. Consistent with developer tooling. Custom DB icons (PostgreSQL elephant, etc).
brands.interactiveStates:
• Hover: Lighter background (#3E3E3E), green border accent
• Focus: Green ring (2px)
• Active: Scale 0.98
• Running: Pulsing green indicator
• Success: Green checkmark + brief glow
brands.mediaPatterns:
• Code comparisons: Side-by-side, dark blocks
• Architecture diagrams: Dark bg, green + white lines
• Dashboard screenshots: Rounded, dark with green accents
• API examples: Terminal-style display
• Video: Dark player, green progress bar
brands.copyVoice: Developer-friendly, open-source proud. 'The open source Firebase alternative.' Technical but approachable. PostgreSQL expertise. Community-driven. 'Build in a weekend, scale to millions.'

brands.name: Raycast
brands.colorUsage: Red/orange gradient for brand identity. UI is ALWAYS dark — no light mode. Selection highlights are subtle (slightly lighter bg). macOS vibrancy effects. System accent color support. Avoid red in UI (reserved for brand).

typography.headings: SF Pro Display Bold / Inter Bold
typography.body: SF Pro Text Regular / Inter Regular

brands.typographyScale: List Title: 13px/1.3 • List Subtitle: 11px/1.2 • Command: 15px/1.3 • Body: 13px/1.5 • Caption: 11px/1.3. Compact macOS-native sizing. Dense but readable.
brands.spacing: Base: 4px. List item padding: 8px 12px. Section gaps: 16px. Command bar: 12px padding. Extension grid: 16px gap. macOS-density throughout.
brands.components:
• Command Bar: Rounded (10px), dark bg, centered search input
• List Items: Icon (24px) + title + subtitle + accessory right
• Actions: Keyboard shortcut badges (⌘K style)
• Extensions: Grid cards, icon + name
• Form: Dark inputs, inline validation
• Shortcuts: Pill badges with key symbols
brands.elevation:
• Window: macOS native shadow + vibrancy
• Popover: 0 4px 20px rgba(0,0,0,0.4)
• No internal elevation — flat dark surfaces
• Vibrancy: NSVisualEffectView blur
brands.motion: Instant, responsive. Duration: 100-150ms max. Selection: Immediate bg change. List scroll: Native macOS physics. Window: Spring animation on open. Keyboard-speed is the goal.
brands.layout: Command bar centered. Results list below. Detail pane optional right. Full keyboard navigation. No mouse required. Extension store: Grid layout.
brands.responsive: macOS-only native app. Adaptive width (600-800px typical). Height based on results. No mobile — desktop launcher only.
brands.iconStyle: macOS-style app icons, 24-32px in lists. SF Symbols for system actions. Extension icons: Rounded square (8px radius). Colored or monochrome based on context.
brands.interactiveStates:
• Selected: Background #2D2D2D, subtle highlight
• Hover: Slightly lighter than selected
• Active: Instant response
• Disabled: 40% opacity
• Keyboard focus: Always visible, no mouse needed
brands.mediaPatterns:
• Extension icons: 64px for store, 24px in lists
• Screenshots: macOS window chrome, dark theme
• Keyboard hints: Inline with content
• Empty states: Centered illustration + message
• Onboarding: Step-by-step with keyboard shortcuts
brands.copyVoice: Speed-focused, keyboard-centric. 'Supercharged productivity.' macOS-native language. Keyboard shortcuts are features. Extension ecosystem. 'Blazingly fast.'

brands.name: Framer
brands.colorUsage: Blue for primary CTAs and links. Editor is dark, marketing/sites can be light. Purple for Pro/premium features. Canvas shows user content — chrome stays minimal. Gradients (blue→purple→pink) for brand moments.
brands.typographyScale: Display: 72px/1.0/−0.02em • H1: 56px/1.1 • H2: 40px/1.15 • H3: 28px/1.2 • Body: 18px/1.6 • Small: 14px/1.5 • Panel labels: 11px/1.3 caps.
brands.spacing: Base: 8px. Panel padding: 12px. Section gaps: 24-48px. Canvas: Infinite. Marketing sections: 80-120px vertical. Grid gap: 16-24px.
brands.components:
• Canvas: Infinite, grid snapping, zoom 25-400%
• Properties Panel: Right side, sectioned accordions
• Layers: Left panel, tree structure, drag-sort
• Insert Menu: Grid of components, search
• Buttons: Rounded (8px), blue primary, 36-40px
• Code Override: Monaco editor, dark theme
brands.elevation:
• Level 0: No shadow (canvas content)
• Level 1: 0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.08) — Panels
• Level 2: 0 4px 16px rgba(0,0,0,0.12) — Dropdowns
• Level 3: 0 8px 32px rgba(0,0,0,0.16) — Modals
brands.motion: Motion is core to brand. Duration: 200-400ms. Ease: cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0, 1) spring-like. Canvas animations preview inline. Page transitions: Smooth, configurable. Hover effects encouraged.
brands.layout: Editor: Left layers (240px), Canvas (flexible), Right properties (280px). Top toolbar. Site pages in tabs. Marketing: Full-width sections, centered content (1200px max).
brands.responsive:
• Desktop (>1280px): Full editor layout
• Laptop (1024-1280px): Collapsible panels
• Tablet/Mobile: Preview mode only, no editing
• Published sites: Fully responsive by design (breakpoints built-in)
brands.iconStyle: Clean line icons, 16-20px. 1.5px stroke. Minimal detail. Custom Framer icons for components. Monochrome in panels.
brands.interactiveStates:
• Hover: Background highlight, cursor change
• Focus: Blue ring (2px)
• Selected: Blue border on canvas, highlight in layers
• Drag: Ghost element, drop indicators
• Resize: Corner handles, dimension labels
brands.mediaPatterns:
• Templates: Preview cards with hover interaction
• Component previews: Live mini-previews
• Site screenshots: Browser mockups, device frames
• Animations: Inline video/GIF previews
• Code examples: Syntax highlighted, dark blocks
brands.copyVoice: Creative, empowering, motion-focused. 'Ship sites that move.' Designer-friendly, no-code accessible. Animation is natural. 'Design, animate, publish.' Component-based language.

brands.name: X (Twitter)
brands.colorUsage: Blue for interactive elements (legacy Twitter blue #1D9BF0). X rebrand emphasizes black/white. Red for likes, green for retweets. Yellow for premium verification. Dark mode is popular default. Minimal color in feed — content is focus.
brands.typographyScale: Display Name: 20px/1.2 • Username: 15px/1.2 • Tweet: 15px/1.35 • Timestamp: 13px/1.2 • Count: 13px/1.2 Bold. Compact, scannable scale for feeds.
brands.spacing: Base: 4px. Tweet padding: 12px 16px. Avatar gap: 12px. Section dividers: 1px border. Feed width: 598px. Sidebar: 350px. Full-width mobile.
brands.components:
• Tweet: Avatar (40px) + content + actions row
• Compose: Rounded textarea, character count, media buttons
• Avatar: Circle, 40px feed / 48px profile / 134px profile header
• Action buttons: Icon + count, spaced evenly
• Trends: # + topic name + count
• Who to follow: Avatar + name + username + follow button
brands.elevation:
• Level 0: No shadow (flat feed)
• Level 1: 0 0 15px rgba(0,0,0,0.1) — Compose modal
• Level 2: 0 8px 28px rgba(0,0,0,0.15) — Modals
• Popover: 0 0 10px rgba(0,0,0,0.1)
brands.motion: Minimal, instant. Like: Heart fill + scale pop (300ms). Retweet: Green flash. New tweets: Slide down or count badge. Duration: 150-200ms. Loading: Skeleton shimmer.
brands.layout: 3-column: Left nav (275px), Feed (598px), Right sidebar (350px). Mobile: Bottom tab bar, single column. Infinite scroll. Sticky compose button (mobile).
brands.responsive:
• Desktop (>1265px): Full 3-column, sidebar visible
• Laptop (1005-1265px): Sidebar hidden
• Tablet (500-1005px): Nav becomes icons (68px)
• Mobile (<500px): Bottom tabs, full-width tweets, floating compose
brands.iconStyle: Custom X icons, 18-24px. 1.5px stroke outline, filled when active. Home, Search, Notifications, Messages, Bookmarks. Action icons: Reply, Retweet, Like, Share.
brands.interactiveStates:
• Hover: Background rgba for tweet, icon color change
• Like hover: Pink tint, heart outlines red
• Retweet hover: Green tint
• Focus: Blue outline ring
• Active: Scale pop for like/retweet
• Loading: Skeleton shimmer
brands.mediaPatterns:
• Avatar: 40px in feed, 48px in profiles, 134px in headers
• Images: Max 2-up or 4-up grid, 16:9 or 1:1 crops, rounded (16px)
• Video: 16:9, inline autoplay muted, tap for sound
• Quote tweet: Nested card with border
• Link preview: Image + title + domain, rounded card
brands.copyVoice: Brief, real-time, public. 'What's happening?' 280 characters max (or longer for Premium). Hashtags and mentions. Conversational, newsy. Hot takes encouraged.

brands.name: Instagram
brands.colorUsage: Gradient (purple→pink→orange→yellow) for brand identity only — NOT in UI. Blue for all interactive elements (links, buttons, verified). Red for likes/hearts. UI is minimal — photos are color. Stories ring uses gradient.

typography.headings: Instagram Sans Bold / Proxima Nova Bold
typography.body: Instagram Sans Regular / Proxima Nova Regular

brands.typographyScale: Display Name: 14px/1.3 Bold • Username: 14px/1.3 • Caption: 14px/1.4 • Comment: 14px/1.4 • Timestamp: 10px/1.2 • Stats: 16px Bold. Very compact for content density.
brands.spacing: Base: 4px. Post padding: 0 (photos edge-to-edge). Caption padding: 0 12px 16px. Avatar gap: 12px. Feed max-width: 470px. Minimal spacing overall.
brands.components:
• Post: Full-width image + header (avatar+name+menu) + actions + caption + comments
• Stories: Circle avatar (56px) with gradient ring, horizontal scroll
• Avatar: Circle, 32px posts / 56px stories / 150px profile
• Action row: Like, Comment, Share, Save icons
• Reels: Full-screen video, actions on right
• Grid: 3-column squares (1:1), 3px gap
brands.elevation:
• Level 0: No shadow (flat, image-focused)
• Level 1: 0 4px 12px rgba(0,0,0,0.15) — Modals
• Stories: Ring shadow for active viewing
• Minimal elevation — content is flat
brands.motion: Smooth, polished. Like: Heart burst animation (red fill + scale). Double-tap: Large heart overlay. Stories: Horizontal slide. Reels: Vertical swipe. Duration: 200-300ms. Loading: Skeleton shimmer.
brands.layout: Feed: Single column centered (470px max). Stories tray top (horizontal scroll). Profile: 3-column grid. Reels: Full-screen. Mobile-first, responsive scaling.
brands.responsive:
• Desktop (>735px): Feed centered, sidebars with suggestions
• Tablet (600-735px): Full-width feed
• Mobile (<600px): Full-width, bottom tab bar, edge-to-edge photos, stories tray sticky
brands.iconStyle: Custom Instagram icons, 24px. Outline (2px stroke) default, filled when active. Camera, Heart, Comment, Share, Save, Profile. Clean, recognizable.
brands.interactiveStates:
• Hover: Darken on buttons
• Like: Red heart fill + burst animation
• Double-tap: Large heart overlay on image
• Bookmark: Fill animation
• Focus: Blue outline
• Stories viewed: Gray ring (vs gradient unviewed)
brands.mediaPatterns:
• Feed images: 1:1 (square), 4:5 (portrait), 1.91:1 (landscape), rounded (0px mobile, 4px desktop)
• Stories: 9:16, full-screen, swipe navigation
• Reels: 9:16, full-screen, sound on
• Profile grid: 1:1 squares, 3px gap, 3 columns
• Avatar: 32px in posts, 56px stories, 77px suggestions, 150px profile page
• Carousel: Dots indicator below, swipe horizontal
brands.copyVoice: Visual-first, caption optional. Hashtags for discovery. Emojis welcome. Authentic, lifestyle. 'Caption this.' Comments are conversations. Influencer-friendly.

brands.name: TikTok
brands.colorUsage: Red+Cyan 'glitch' effect is signature (logo shadow offset). Black background always for video immersion. Pink for likes. UI text is white on dark. Minimal chrome — video is 100% focus. Glitch/3D effects for brand moments.

typography.headings: TikTok Sans Bold / Proxima Nova Bold
typography.body: TikTok Sans Regular / Proxima Nova Regular

brands.typographyScale: Username: 16px/1.25 Bold • Description: 14px/1.35 • Hashtags: 14px/1.35 Bold • Stats: 12px/1.2 • Action counts: 12px. Very compact, readable over video.
brands.spacing: Base: 4px. Side actions: 16px from edge. Bottom info: 16px padding. Video: Full-screen bleed. Minimal UI spacing.
brands.components:
• Video: Full-screen, swipe vertical to navigate
• Side actions: Vertical stack (avatar, like, comment, share, sound)
• Avatar: Circle, 44px with + button overlay for follow
• Bottom info: Username, description, hashtags, sound (scrolling)
• For You/Following: Tab toggle at top
• Sound disc: Spinning album art (40px circle)
brands.elevation:
• No shadows — flat over video
• Text shadows: 0 1px 2px rgba(0,0,0,0.5) for readability
• Action icons: No elevation, just over video
brands.motion: Energetic, viral. Duration: 150-250ms. Video autoplay: Immediate. Swipe: Spring physics. Like: Heart burst. Sound disc: Continuous rotation. Duet effects: Split-screen. Glitch transitions for effects.
brands.layout: Full-screen vertical video (9:16). Actions right side. Info bottom left. Header: For You | Following tabs. Profile: Grid of video thumbnails. Mobile-first, desktop adapts.
brands.responsive:
• Desktop (>768px): Video centered with black bars, sidebar nav
• Mobile (default): Full-screen video, bottom tab bar, swipe navigation
• No tablet-specific — phone optimized
brands.iconStyle: Bold, simple icons, 24-32px. Filled style. Works over video with shadow. Like heart, Comment bubble, Share arrow, Sound disc. High contrast for visibility.
brands.interactiveStates:
• Tap: Play/pause video
• Like tap: Pink heart burst + fill
• Double-tap: Like shortcut
• Swipe up: Next video (immediate)
• Hold: Speed controls
• Follow: + becomes ✓
brands.mediaPatterns:
• Video: 9:16 mandatory, full-screen, sound-on default
• Profile grid: 3 columns, video thumbnails (1:1 or 9:16 crops)
• Avatar: 44px on videos, 100px on profile
• Sound: Scrolling text with album art disc
• Duet/Stitch: Split-screen video compositions
• Effects: AR filters, text overlays, transitions
brands.copyVoice: Gen Z native, trendy, viral. Hashtag challenges. Sound-based culture. Short, punchy captions. Emojis everywhere. 'Make Your Day.' Creator economy language.
